# registry_role_template (Resource)

Manages a registry RBAC role template.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "registry_role_template" "module_publisher" {
  name         = "module-publisher"
  display_name = "Module Publisher"
  description  = "Can publish and manage modules"
  scopes       = ["modules:read", "modules:write", "organizations:read"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String) Human-readable display name.
- `name` (String) Machine-readable name (e.g., 'publisher').
- `scopes` (List of String) List of permission scopes assigned to this role.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description of the role.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp when the role template was created.
- `id` (String) UUID of the role template.
- `is_system` (Boolean) Whether this is a built-in system role (cannot be deleted).
- `updated_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp when the role template was last updated.
